currentRuntimeState.note: This separates proven local capability, cached internal tester warmth, and live mobile odds freshness. Cached tester readiness requires warm no-quota loops; live odds readiness additionally requires fresh mobile-visible provider snapshots.

managedProcesses.note: Read-only live process check from local .runtime state and OS pid existence. Ready status is based on proven local capability and fresh data, not on requiring background loops to be running right now.

selectedAction.label: Keep cached local internal testing mode
selectedAction.reason: Replays/restores the selected one-event runtime and verifies readiness without provider quota.

actions.label: Keep cached local internal testing mode
actions.reason: Replays/restores the selected one-event runtime and verifies readiness without provider quota.

actions.label: Start full local internal tester runtime
actions.reason: Starts or reuses local backend/Expo, then starts the cached supervisor and result-poller with result ingestion and approved-settlement wait mode.

actions.label: Prove one-command local runtime loops
actions.reason: Starts the local supervisor/result-poller through onboarding, proves both are running, then stops them without provider quota.

actions.label: Refresh mobile-visible live odds
actions.reason: Selected market provider snapshots are stale under the mobile 90-second live-display window; use the secret wrapper so the provider key stays in the process environment or ignored local secret file.

actions.label: Start local cached supervisor loop
actions.reason: Keeps local maker/lifecycle/result dry-run checks warm in cached no-quota mode while the process is running.

actions.label: Start local cached result poller
actions.reason: Repeats provider-shaped result ingestion and settlement scheduling dry-runs without provider quota.

actions.label: Wait for closed market before settlement
actions.reason: Active-event trusted-result settlement is intentionally blocked while the selected market is not CLOSED.

operatorNextActions.safety: Commands are local-only. Provider-refresh commands require THE_ODDS_API_KEY in the environment or ignored .runtime/secrets/the-odds-api-key.txt file and remain quota-capped by the underlying proof scripts; the status route never returns or reads the key.

selectedEventLifecycle.title: Spain vs. France
selectedEventLifecycle.note: Read-only selected-event lifecycle timing. It mirrors the one-event lifecycle scheduler timing rule and does not mutate markets.

launch.step: Start or verify local tester runtime
launch.notes: Runtime capability is proven, but supervisor/result-poller loops are not both running now.

launch.expected: Expo should load the server-backed app and reach the backend on port 3002.
launch.notes: If a stale Expo listener is reused, restart with the explicit ReplaceExternalExpo manager path.

manualTradingFlow.notes: Tap the event card to open Event Detail.

manualTradingFlow.expected: Markets load from backend for odds-api-single-soccer-test; selected proof market is Spain vs. France: Total Goals 2.5.
manualTradingFlow.notes: Cached mode is usable for internal testing; live mobile odds refresh requires the explicit provider-refresh command.

manualTradingFlow.expected: Open Over 2.5, enter an amount, and swipe to buy with fake tokens.
manualTradingFlow.notes: Order must use the selected market/outcome identity from Event Detail.

manualTradingFlow.expected: Portfolio shows the bought position and activity/history records.
manualTradingFlow.notes: Cashout should open close-position mode, not a new buy ticket.

manualTradingFlow.expected: Max uses owned shares only, no Yes/No selector appears, and selling updates History.
manualTradingFlow.notes: Selling more than owned shares must be impossible in UI and rejected by backend.

lifecycleChecks.expected: Event remains open for internal testing until the next lifecycle action.
lifecycleChecks.notes: Current window: pre_start_open; next lifecycle action: pause at 2026-07-14T18:55:00.000Z.

lifecycleChecks.expected: Stale/closed markets reject order placement with MARKET_UNAVAILABLE.
lifecycleChecks.notes: Use stale-guard proof for automated verification; do not spend provider quota for this checklist.

lifecycleChecks.expected: Active event waits for CLOSED market plus exact approval before settlement.
lifecycleChecks.notes: Active tester settlement must not execute while the selected market is LIVE.

p1: Installed unattended provider/maker/lifecycle service ownership remains open.
Production official-result auto-settlement remains open; active-event execution is still guarded by CLOSED market status and exact confirmation.
p2: Multi-event provider polling and production dashboard/operator UI remain future work.

note: Read-only operator snapshot. It calls local health/status routes only, does not call providers, does not read provider keys, and does not start loops or execute settlement. The checklist is generated from backend status so testers can run the current one-event flow without digging through broad proof artifacts.
